task_completion.description: Verify the patient's given and family names are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Meredith' is visible in the Given Name field and 'Voss' in the Family Name field on the OpenMRS registration form, or these names are clearly displayed on the final patient summary page.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's sex is selected as Female.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Female' option is selected in the sex/gender field of the registration form, or 'F'/'Female' is shown on the final patient summary page.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's date of birth is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '1989-03-22' (or equivalent UI format such as 22-Mar-1989) is entered in the birthdate fields, or shown on the final patient summary page.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's address and city are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The street address '407 Cascade Way' and city 'Seattle' are entered in the respective address fields of the registration form, or shown on the final patient summary page.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient registration was successfully completed and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Patient Created') is visible, or the browser has navigated to the patient's chart/dashboard showing 'Meredith Voss' with a newly assigned OpenMRS patient ID.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS SPA interface (http://localhost/openmrs/spa), not a text editor or static mockups.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The registration should be performed by clicking and typing in the web UI. There should be no evidence of curl commands or API scripts being executed in a terminal to create the patient.

integrity.description: Ensure the final success state is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final patient chart or success message should be a standard OpenMRS UI element, without signs of manual HTML manipulation or developer console tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient must be registered with the following exact details: Given name: 'Meredith', Family name: 'Voss', Date of birth: '1989-03-22', Sex: 'Female' (F), Address: '407 Cascade Way', City: 'Seattle'.
